SQLLite.SQL: SELECT PAY.PAYABLE_ORDER_NUMBER_1 AS "PayableOrderNumber1" , PAY.PAYMENT_FOR AS "PaymentFor" , PAY.PAYEE_NAME AS "PayeeName" , PAY.PAYOUT_DATE AS "PayoutDate" , PAY.PAYOUT_REPORT_ID AS "PayoutReportId" , PAY.AMOUNT AS "Amount" , PAY.OVERPAYMENT_AMOUNT AS "OverpaymentAmount" , PAY.RETENTION_TYPE AS "RetentionType" FROM PAYMENTS PAY WHERE PAY.TRANSACTION_NUMBER = ${param.transactionNumber} AND PAY.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode} FOR UPDATE OF PAY.PAYABLE_ORDER_NUMBER_1

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin
